assembly_context.name: Modern_Square_Table_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 设计一个现代简约四腿方桌装配体。包含1个矩形桌面、4根相同的方形截面桌腿、1个整体式矩形横梁框架。桌腿通过面贴合与同心配合固定在桌面下方，横梁框架位于桌腿内侧底部附近，通过面贴合与同心配合连接桌腿，形成稳定结构。
design_rules: Units are in mm for dimensions, convert to meters for API calls if necessary.
Use coincident constraints for face mating and concentric constraints for axis alignment.
Table legs are positioned at the four corners of the tabletop underside.
Cross beam frame is centered under the table, connecting the inner faces of the legs.

instances.name: Front Left Leg
instances.placement_notes: Positioned at X=-580, Y=-280 relative to table center. Top face mates with table bottom.

instances.name: Front Right Leg
instances.placement_notes: Positioned at X=580, Y=-280 relative to table center. Top face mates with table bottom.

instances.name: Back Left Leg
instances.placement_notes: Positioned at X=-580, Y=280 relative to table center. Top face mates with table bottom.

instances.name: Back Right Leg
instances.placement_notes: Positioned at X=580, Y=280 relative to table center. Top face mates with table bottom.

assembly_sequence: Mate inst_leg_fl top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_fr top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_bl top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_br top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_x_minus to inst_leg_fl inner_face_x_plus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_x_plus to inst_leg_fr inner_face_x_minus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_y_minus to inst_leg_fl inner_face_y_plus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_y_plus to inst_leg_bl inner_face_y_minus

part.name: Table Leg
part.shape: Square prism with cross-section 40mm x 40mm and height 720mm.
part.material_or_notes: Solid wood or metal. Square profile.

faces.name: top_face
faces.purpose: Mates with table top bottom face

faces.name: inner_face_x_plus
faces.purpose: Inner face facing towards center along X
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal +X (local, assuming leg oriented such that this face points inward)

faces.name: inner_face_y_plus
faces.purpose: Inner face facing towards center along Y
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal +Y (local, assuming leg oriented such that this face points inward)

axes.name: center_axis_z
axes.purpose: Vertical axis for concentric constraint with beam ends

assembly_relation_notes: Four instances placed at corners of the table top underside.
Top face mates with table top bottom face.
Inner faces mate with cross beam frame end faces.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create a sketch on the XY plane.
Draw a square 40mm x 40mm centered at origin.
